## Description / Excerpt

A protocol note for Shimmer Lab: projection surfaces, field seeds, shimmerprints, bridge scripts, manifests, and portable state.

Excerpt:

## Core Concept Shimmer Lab is a seed, matrix, and projection workbench for making small digital fields portable. At its simplest: ```text A site exposes anchors. Shimmer tunes them. A field seed remembers the state. A shimmerprint leaves a public trace. ``` Shimmer is not itself
